entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A major grain legume crop, also known as red gram, grown as a subsistence crop and source of protein.

entities.name: LEAF SENESCENCE
entities.description: The biological aging process of leaves, characterized in relation to nutrient partitioning.

entities.name: DRY MATTER AND NITROGEN REMOBILIZATION
entities.description: The process of partitioning and moving dry matter and nitrogen within the plant.

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE REGIMES
entities.description: The different levels of soil moisture under which the plant is grown.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographical region where pigeonpea is a major grain legume crop.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where pigeonpea is widely grown and serves as an important protein source.

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: A nutrient provided by pigeonpea for human nutrition.

entities.name: HUMAN NUTRITION
entities.description: The process of providing nutrients to humans, for which pigeonpea is an important source of protein.
